benchmarks.name: FloatArray add
benchmarks.description: Elementwise add two FloatArrays and return a new array.

benchmarks.name: FloatArray axpy
benchmarks.description: BLAS operation axpy, `y <- y + a * x`.

benchmarks.name: FloatArray gemm
benchmarks.description: C <- A*B + C (BLAS gemm, alpha=1, beta=1) for square n×n matrices. Sizes are the matrix dimension n.

benchmarks.name: FloatArray gemv
benchmarks.description: y <- A*x + y (BLAS gemv, alpha=1, beta=1) for a square n×n matrix. Sizes are the matrix dimension n.

benchmarks.name: FloatArray ger
benchmarks.description: Rank-1 update A += x*yᵀ (BLAS ger, alpha=1) for a square n×n matrix. Sizes are the matrix dimension n.

benchmarks.name: FloatArray nrm2
benchmarks.description: Euclidean norm (BLAS nrm2) of a FloatArray.

benchmarks.name: FloatArray sin
benchmarks.description: In-place sin of each element of a FloatArray.

benchmarks.name: FloatArray sum
benchmarks.description: Sum all elements of one FloatArray.

implementations.name: Lean nat_loop_get
implementations.code:
def floatArrayAdd.nat_loop_get (xs ys : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let mut out := FloatArray.emptyWithCapacity xs.size
  for h : i in 0...(min xs.size ys.size) do
    out := out.push (xs[i] + ys[i])
  return out

implementations.name: Lean usize_loop_uget
implementations.code:
def floatArrayAdd.usize_loop_uget (xs ys : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let mut out := FloatArray.emptyWithCapacity xs.size
  for (i : USize) in 0...(xs.size.toUSize) do
    out := out.push (xs.uget i sorry + ys.uget i sorry)
  return out

implementations.name: C loop via Lean FFI
Lean loop_uset
implementations.code:
def floatArrayAxpy.loop_uset (a : Float) (x y : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let mut y := y
  for i in 0...(y.size.toUSize) do
    let yi := y.uget i sorry
    let xi := x.uget i sorry
    y := y.uset i (yi + a * xi) sorry
  return y

implementations.name: Lean loop_fset
implementations.code:
def floatArrayAxpy.loop_fset (a : Float) (x y : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let mut y := y
  for i in 0...(y.size.toUSize) do
    let yi := y.get i.toNat sorry
    let xi := x.get i.toNat sorry
    y := y.set i.toNat (yi + a * xi) sorry
  return y

implementations.name: Lean loop_set
implementations.code:
def floatArrayAxpy.loop_set (a : Float) (x y : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let mut y := y
  for i in 0...(y.size.toUSize) do
    let yi := y.get! i.toNat
    let xi := x.get! i.toNat
    y := y.set! i.toNat (yi + a * xi)
  return y

implementations.name: Lean while_uset
implementations.code:
def floatArrayAxpy.while_uset (a : Float) (x y : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let mut y := y
  let mut i : USize := 0
  while i < y.size.toUSize do
    let yi := y[i]!
    let xi := x[i]!
    y := y.uset i (yi + a * xi) sorry
    i := i + 1
  return y

implementations.name: Lean while_custom_state
implementations.code:
private structure AxpyState where
  y : FloatArray
  i : USize

def floatArrayAxpy.while_custom_state (a : Float) (x y : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let mut s : AxpyState := { y := y, i := 0 }
  while s.i < s.y.size.toUSize do
    let xi := x.uget s.i sorry
    let yi := s.y.uget s.i sorry
    s := { y := s.y.uset s.i (yi + a * xi) sorry, i := s.i + 1 }
  return s.y

implementations.name: C loop via Lean FFI
Lean usize_loop
implementations.code:
def floatArrayDot.usize_loop (x y : FloatArray) : Float := Id.run do
  let mut s := 0.0
  for i in 0...(x.size.toUSize) do
    s := s + x[i]! * y[i]!
  return s

implementations.name: Lean usize_rec_uget
implementations.code:
partial def floatArrayDot.usize_rec_uget (x y : FloatArray) : Float :=
  go 0 0.0
where
  go (i : USize) (s : Float) : Float :=
    if h : i.toNat < x.size then
      go (i + 1) (s + x.uget i h * y.uget i sorry)
    else
      s

implementations.name: C loop
Lean usize ijk
implementations.code:
def floatArrayGemm.usize_loop_ijk (n : USize) (a b c : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let mut c' := c
  for i in 0...n do
    for j in 0...n do
      let mut sum := c'[i * n + j]!
      for k in 0...n do
        sum := sum + a[i * n + k]! * b[k * n + j]!
      c' := c'.uset (i * n + j) sum sorry
  return c'

implementations.name: Lean usize ikj
implementations.code:
def floatArrayGemm.usize_loop_ikj (n : USize) (a b c : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let mut c' := c
  for i in 0...n do
    for k in 0...n do
      let aik := a[i * n + k]!
      for j in 0...n do
        let idx := i * n + j
        c' := c'.uset idx (c'[idx]! + aik * b[k * n + j]!) sorry
  return c'

implementations.name: Lean usize rec ijk uget
implementations.code:
partial def floatArrayGemm.usize_rec_ijk_uget (n : USize) (a b c : FloatArray) : FloatArray :=
  goI 0 c
where
  goI (i : USize) (c : FloatArray) : FloatArray :=
    if i < n then
      let row := i * n
      goI (i + 1) (goJ row 0 c)
    else
      c

  goJ (row j : USize) (c : FloatArray) : FloatArray :=
    if j < n then
      let idx := row + j
      let sum := goK row j 0 (c.uget idx sorry)
      goJ row (j + 1) (c.uset idx sum sorry)
    else
      c

  goK (row j k : USize) (sum : Float) : Float :=
    if k < n then
      let aik := a.uget (row + k) sorry
      let bkj := b.uget (k * n + j) sorry
      goK row j (k + 1) (sum + aik * bkj)
    else
      sum

implementations.name: Lean usize rec ikj uget
implementations.code:
partial def floatArrayGemm.usize_rec_ikj_uget (n : USize) (a b c : FloatArray) : FloatArray :=
  goI 0 c
where
  goI (i : USize) (c : FloatArray) : FloatArray :=
    if i < n then
      let row := i * n
      goI (i + 1) (goK row 0 c)
    else
      c

  goK (row k : USize) (c : FloatArray) : FloatArray :=
    if k < n then
      let brow := k * n
      let aik := a.uget (row + k) sorry
      goK row (k + 1) (goJ row brow aik 0 c)
    else
      c

  goJ (row brow : USize) (aik : Float) (j : USize) (c : FloatArray) : FloatArray :=
    if j < n then
      let idx := row + j
      let cij := c.uget idx sorry
      let bkj := b.uget (brow + j) sorry
      goJ row brow aik (j + 1) (c.uset idx (cij + aik * bkj) sorry)
    else
      c

implementations.name: C ijk
C ikj
Lean usize_loop
implementations.code:
def floatArrayGemv.usize_loop (a x y : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let nU := x.size.toUSize
  let mut y' := y
  for i in 0...nU do
    let mut sum := y'[i]!
    for j in 0...nU do
      sum := sum + a[i * nU + j]! * x[j]!
    y' := y'.uset i sum sorry
  return y'

implementations.name: Lean usize_rec_uget
implementations.code:
partial def floatArrayGemv.usize_rec_uget (a x y : FloatArray) : FloatArray :=
  let n := x.size.toUSize
  goI n 0 y
where
  goI (n i : USize) (y : FloatArray) : FloatArray :=
    if h : i.toNat < y.size then
      let row := i * n
      let sum := goJ n row 0 (y.uget i h)
      goI n (i + 1) (y.uset i sum h)
    else
      y

  goJ (n row j : USize) (sum : Float) : Float :=
    if h : j.toNat < x.size then
      let aij := a.uget (row + j) sorry
      let xj := x.uget j h
      goJ n row (j + 1) (sum + aij * xj)
    else
      sum

implementations.name: C loop
Lean usize_loop
implementations.code:
def floatArrayGer.usize_loop (a x y : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let nU := x.size.toUSize
  let mut a' := a
  for i in 0...nU do
    for j in 0...nU do
      let idx := i * nU + j
      a' := a'.uset idx (a'[idx]! + x[i]! * y[j]!) sorry
  return a'

implementations.name: Lean usize_rec_uget
implementations.code:
partial def floatArrayGer.usize_rec_uget (a x y : FloatArray) : FloatArray :=
  let n := x.size.toUSize
  goI n 0 a
where
  goI (n i : USize) (a : FloatArray) : FloatArray :=
    if h : i.toNat < x.size then
      let row := i * n
      let xi := x.uget i h
      goI n (i + 1) (goJ n row xi 0 a)
    else
      a

  goJ (n row : USize) (xi : Float) (j : USize) (a : FloatArray) : FloatArray :=
    if h : j.toNat < y.size then
      let idx := row + j
      let aij := a.uget idx sorry
      let yj := y.uget j h
      goJ n row xi (j + 1) (a.uset idx (aij + xi * yj) sorry)
    else
      a

implementations.name: C loop
Lean usize_loop
implementations.code:
def floatArrayNrm2.usize_loop (xs : FloatArray) : Float := Id.run do
  let mut s := 0.0
  for i in 0...(xs.size.toUSize) do
    let x := xs[i]!
    s := s + x * x
  return Float.sqrt s

Lean nat_loop
implementations.code:
def floatArraySin.nat_loop (xs : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let mut xs' := xs
  for i in [0:xs'.size] do
    xs' := xs'.set! i (Float.sin xs'[i]!)
  return xs'

    xs' := xs'.uset i (Float.sin xs'[i]!) sorry

implementations.name: C loop
Lean nat_rec
implementations.code:
def floatArraySum.nat_rec (xs : FloatArray) : Float :=
  go 0 0
where
  go (i : Nat) (s : Float) : Float :=
    if h : i < xs.size then
      go (i+1) (s + xs[i])
    else
      s

implementations.name: Lean usize_rec
implementations.code:
partial def floatArraySum.usize_rec (xs : FloatArray) : Float :=
  go 0 0
where
  go (i : USize) (s : Float) : Float :=
    if h : i.toNat < xs.size then
      go (i+1) (s + xs.uget i h)
    else
      s

implementations.name: Lean foreach_loop
implementations.code:
def floatArraySum.foreach_loop (xs : FloatArray) : Float := Id.run do
  let mut s := 0
  for x in xs do
    s := s + x
  return s

implementations.name: Lean nat_loop
implementations.code:
def floatArraySum.nat_loop (xs : FloatArray) : Float := Id.run do
  let mut s := 0
  for h : i in 0...xs.size do
    s := s + xs[i]
  return s

implementations.name: Lean usize_loop_get!
implementations.code:
def floatArraySum.usize_loop_get! (xs : FloatArray) : Float := Id.run do
  let mut s := 0
  for (i : USize) in 0...(xs.size.toUSize) do
    s := s + xs[i]!
  return s

implementations.name: Lean usize_while_get!
implementations.code:
def floatArraySum.usize_while_get! (xs : FloatArray) : Float := Id.run do
  let mut s := 0
  let mut i : USize := 0
  while i < xs.size.toUSize do
    s := s + xs[i]!
    i := i + 1
  return s

implementations.name: Lean while_custom_state
implementations.code:
structure State where
  sum : Float
  idx : USize

def floatArraySum.while_custom_state (xs : FloatArray) : Float := Id.run do
  let mut s : State :=  { sum := 0, idx := 0 }
  while s.idx < xs.size.toUSize do
    s := { s  with
      sum := s.sum + xs[s.idx]!,
      idx := s.idx + 1}
  return s.sum

implementations.name: C double loop
Lean usize_loop
implementations.code:
def floatArraySwap.usize_loop (x y : FloatArray) : FloatArray × FloatArray := Id.run do
  let n := x.size.toUSize
  let mut xs := x
  let mut ys := y
  for i in 0...n do
    let tmp := xs[i]!
    xs := xs.uset i ys[i]! sorry
    ys := ys.uset i tmp sorry
  return (xs, ys)

implementations.name: Lean usize_rec_uget
implementations.code:
partial def floatArraySwap.usize_rec_uget (x y : FloatArray) : FloatArray × FloatArray :=
  go 0 x y
where
  go (i : USize) (x y : FloatArray) : FloatArray × FloatArray :=
    if h : i.toNat < x.size then
      let xi := x.uget i h
      let yi := y.uget i sorry
      go (i + 1) (x.uset i yi h) (y.uset i xi sorry)
    else
      (x, y)
